dj_text: It's NovaJane and this is That Pirate Bot DJ Radio. That was Paradis Brænder. Let's keep the mood going with Fucking Nummer. Just one more to go after this.
commercial_text: This is a test of the Emergency Radio System. If this were an actual emergency, you'd hear me screaming. It's not.
recovery_text: Dimensional bleed. Happens sometimes. Never to US, but sometimes.
title: Fucking Nummer
